name: mastergo-dsl-toolchain
description: MasterGo DSL to Code Toolchain - High fidelity page generation with visual editing

scripts.dev:all: npm run server & npm run dev
scripts.dev:full: concurrently --names "server,dev,react" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta,green" "npm run server" "npm run dev" "cd react-app && npm run dev"
